column4: Define overall story for the World
Design rough idea of enemies, including elite(s) and boss (3-4 standard, 1-2 elite, 1 boss)
Roughly design the main gameplay gimmick of the World
Identify any new engine/UI/system requirements for this world (new events, UI hooks, combat tags, validators)
Define hubs
Define story entry, climax, and exit for each hub
Define nodes and what happens in each
Draft 'World Done Definition' checklist (binary ship criteria)
GATE: Week 1 — story + hubs + nodes coherent; major beats defined; no obvious story holes
Define the main and side quests
Outline progression & reward pacing (XP/currency/loot/shops/skill timing)
Define events, puzzles and unique actionable words
Plan encounters per node (enemy comps, elite cadence, boss runway, ambush rules)
Define fail states & recovery rules (defeat, key items, bricked quests, repeat triggers)
Define the room maps of each node (draw the map on Mobiscribe)
^ continued
Define rooms where events and puzzles take place
GATE: Week 2 — hubs/nodes/quests/events mapped to rooms; no contradictions/unreachable critical path
Generate rough room descriptions for each room
Refine enemies, including elite(s) and boss
Define NPCs
Design items and equipment
Design mods
Design skills learned
Design and define inventories of shops
Add all enemies including elites and boss, NPCs, items, equipment, skills, mods, and shops to JSON
Run JSON schema/validator; fix missing refs, duplicate IDs, broken exits; generate report
Define save/load persistence flags for quests/events/shops (what must be stored)
GATE: Week 3 — JSON validates & loads; world skeleton playable (no broken refs/exits)
Generate hub screen art for all hubs, generate room background images
Generate room background images
^ continued
Generate enemy, elite and boss art
Create any new animations
Performance/memory budget check; optimize/export assets for mobile
Roughly design cutscenes and note their place in the story
Fully design the main gameplay gimmick
^ continued
Place rooms in World Editor with their descriptions to build rooms.json
Integration pass: wire new world gimmick + event types into engine/UI (placeholder OK)
Place NPCs
GATE: Week 5 — start→main quest complete→exit playable with placeholder text
Build QUESTS with filler dialogue
Build CUTSCENES with filler text/dialogue
Build EVENTS, PUZZLES, and MAIN GIMMICK with filler text
^ continued
Build SHOPS and OTHER with filler text
Save/load torture test + state consistency (quest flags, shop state, event triggers)
Write completed game prose for ROOM DESCRIPTIONS
Write completed game prose for TUTORIALS
Audit tutorial & narrative popup triggers (exactly once unless intended)
Write completed game prose for QUEST DIALOGUE
Write completed game prose for NARRATIVE POPUPS
Write completed game prose for CUTSCENES
Write completed game prose for MISCELLANEOUS DIALOGUE (dialogue not related to quests)
Write completed game prose for ITEM AND SKILL DESCRIPTIONS
Quick UX/accessibility pass: text size, tap targets, contrast, animation toggles
Implement completed game prose (all text assets)
Integration + regression suite (smoke tests: start, combat, shop, quest turn-in, exit)
Save/load sanity check (hub, node, combat start/end, mid-quest)
Balance pass (combat, economy, rewards, cooldown/weakness tempo)
Softlock hunt + save/load stress test (fresh save → world exit)
Performance + UX/accessibility pass + implement core audio cues
Plan next world + postmortem + bug triage/backlog
